# Genotyping Populus at scRNA-polymorphism locus
```{R}
library(magrittr)

# Read GATK table
path_gatk_table <- "outputs/VariantCalling-DNA/gatk_variantstotable/Ptr.raw.tsv"
gatk_table <- read.table(
    path_gatk_table,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
```

# Basic information
```{R}
nrow(gatk_table)
```
[1] 196076

# Type distribution of the variants
```{R}
table(gatk_table$TYPE)
```
       INDEL        MIXED NO_VARIATION          SNP 
        2051          790        55428       137807

# Genotype distribution at non-variant sites
```{R}
genotype_no_variation <- gatk_table[gatk_table$TYPE == "NO_VARIATION", c("HET","HOM.REF", "HOM.VAR")] %>%
    apply(1, function(x) {
        c("HET","HOM.REF", "HOM.VAR")[which(x != 0)]
    }) %>% unlist
table(genotype_no_variation)
```
